top_signals.title: Tech Selloff Deepens Ahead of CPI; US, Iran Exchange Strikes | Bloomberg Brief 6/10/2026
top_signals.summary: US equity futures edge lower ahead of the CPI data. The US strikes Iran in retaliation after shooting down an American Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz, putting a potential peace deal at risk. Ken Cancel, Churchill Asset Management CEO, and Anuj Ranjan, Brookfield Private Equity CEO, join Bloomberg's Dani Burger at SuperReturn in Berlin. Andrew Hollenhorst of Citi looks ahead to the inflation print and the Fed's rate path.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Microsoft: Some Windows PCs fail to install latest monthly updates
top_signals.summary: Microsoft warned customers on Tuesday that they may have issues installing the latest monthly updates on some Windows devices that were upgraded to Windows 11 24H2 or 25H2. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MTN Finalizing Nigeria, Uganda Fintech Spinoffs; Adds Alipay
top_signals.summary: MTN Group Ltd. is finalizing the spinoffs of its Nigerian and Ugandan financial-technology operations as part of a reorganization of its mobile-money unit to allow Mastercard Inc. and other strategic buyers to take minority stakes in its fintech businesses.
